QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_25

question.text: When the Alternative Risk Management Framework (ARMF) is activated:

answer.text: Spread margin benefit is completely removed and ad-hoc margins may be imposed
Margins are reduced to encourage trading

explanation.text: **The Logic:** When ARMF activates: (1) spread margin benefit is completely removed, (2) ad-hoc margins may be imposed, (3) additional/special/concentration margins can be levied at CC discretion. **The Trap:** Trading continues (not suspended). Margins increase (not decrease). All instruments can be affected. **Cross-Exam Context:** ARMF is specific to commodity derivative risk management. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** ARMF activation signals extreme market stress — if you see spread margin benefits disappearing, it's a warning to reduce positions and increase cash reserves.
